scope: Mechanism noun 'supersession sidecar' and file extension '.supersessions.jsonl'
corrected_assertion: The mechanism layer is renamed to 'amendment record' (was 'supersession sidecar'). The file extension is '.amendments.jsonl' (was '.supersessions.jsonl'). Three-layer vocabulary now formalized: PRINCIPLE=Evidence-Bound Retrieval (EBR), SYSTEM=Accretive Memory, MECHANISM=amendment record. Backwards compatibility (load-bearing): memory-merge.mjs and memory-index-build.mjs prefer the new .amendments.jsonl but FALL BACK to .supersessions.jsonl when the new extension is absent — the operator's live ~/.claude/projects/*/memory/*.supersessions.jsonl files keep working without migration. JSON field names unchanged (still superseded_at, superseded_by). Verb forms (supersedes, superseded) retained as standard English.
source: git commit d5c9f5a 'feat(EBR): rename accretive supersession → Evidence-Bound Retrieval (EBR)' 2026-05-27
